title: Ebnerella lasiacantha
taxonomy: Ebnerella lasiacantha is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is a part of the genus Ebnerella, which is a group of plants native to tropical Africa. Ebnerella lasiacantha is further categorized as a member of the order Sapindales, a group of plants known for their characteristic fruit and seed structures. The classification of Ebnerella lasiacantha reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Sapindaceae family. This classification has been established through a combination of morphological and molecular studies.
